aht20_init.message0: Initialize AHT20 temperature and humidity sensor
aht20_init.tooltip: Initialize the AHT20 temperature and humidity sensor, using the I2C interface (address 0x38)

aht20_read_temperature.tooltip: Read the temperature value of the AHT20 sensor (Celsius)

aht20_read_humidity.tooltip: Reading the relative humidity value (percent) of the AHT20 sensor
